headline: DaVita (DVA) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Javier Rodriguez: Thank you, Nic.  DaVita's foundation is clinical excellence, driven by operating rigor that produces durable results.  Today, I'll walk through our first quarter performance, share how technology is enhancing our operations, provide an update on ACA Plans and finish with our outlook for the remainder of the year.
